indicators.name: unmade bed
indicators.rationale: An unmade bed obstructs the floor space and creates a cluttered environment, which is unsuitable for yoga practice.

indicators.name: books and other items on nightstand
indicators.rationale: The presence of books and other items on the nightstand obstructs the floor space and creates a cluttered environment, which is unsuitable for yoga practice.

indicators.name: mirror on wall
indicators.rationale: A mirror can be used to observe and correct posture during yoga practice.

indicators.name: floor area partially covered by bed
indicators.rationale: The bed partially covers the floor area, reducing the available space for yoga practice.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is moderately suitable for yoga practice. While the unmade bed and items on the nightstand obstruct the floor space, the presence of a mirror and partially covered floor area suggests potential for yoga practice. However, the overall clutter and obstruction reduce the suitability to a moderate level.
